creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-03-09 09:49:17 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-toolkits/tk82    Makefile 
  Removed files:
    x11-toolkits/tk82    pkg-deinstall.wish pkg-install.wish 
  Log:
  - Adds TK83_MAN and WISH_WRAPPER to OPTIONS
  - Removes pseudo-installation of wish in favour of new lang/tcl-tk-wrapper port
  - Adds support for NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES knob
  - Uses USE_TCL from bsd.tcl.mk
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:             110089
  Submitted by:   Martin Matuska <martin@matuska.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.57      +13 -5     ports/x11-toolkits/tk82/Makefile
  1.2       +0 -22     ports/x11-toolkits/tk82/pkg-deinstall.wish (dead)
  1.4       +0 -32     ports/x11-toolkits/tk82/pkg-install.wish (dead)
